message:
feat(http2): add send-side flow control and GOAWAY frame support (bd-2c9t)

Implement RFC 7540 send-side flow control so the server respects the
peer's receive window before emitting DATA frames, and add graceful
GOAWAY frame sending on connection shutdown.

- Extend H2FlowControl with send_conn_window and peer_initial_window_size
  tracking, with methods for WINDOW_UPDATE consumption
- Add h2_fc_clamp_send helper that pauses writes when the peer's window
  is exhausted and resumes after receiving WINDOW_UPDATE
- Wire send-side flow control into closure path's write_response
- Add h2_error_code module with RFC 7540 §7 constants
- Add goaway_payload/send_goaway helpers
- Send GOAWAY(NO_ERROR) with correct last_stream_id on graceful shutdown
  in all 3 HTTP/2 paths (app, handler, closure)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
